description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring large floor-to-ceiling windows and clean geometric lines. The exterior is primarily white with sections of stone cladding, and the house is surrounded by landscaped garden beds and small trees. The front includes a paved driveway and a gated entry, while the rear and sides have private patios and terraces. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, maximizing natural light and providing expansive views from multiple rooms. The structure appears to be constructed mainly from concrete, glass, and steel, with visible metal railings and stonework accenting the outdoor spaces. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on open, airy living spaces and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, stone accents, and landscaped gardens. The design is minimalist and open, with asymmetrical window placement and multiple terraces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, gated entry, and landscaped garden with stone borders.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large windows, private patio, and garden area with trees and stonework.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying expansive glass walls, a terrace, and a visible interior living space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring additional garden beds, a secondary entry, and more asymmetrical window placement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple modern door, paved steps, and a gated driveway, accented by stone landscaping and minimal overhang.
